Appearances:
Plaintiff Chi Fai Kam is present.

Defendant Fabiani Fabricio dba The Finishing Touch is present.

The Hon. Leslie Nichols Judge , litigants and counsel confer in Dept.624, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Oct-01-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
